title: Section 40
content: 140. When occupier is to pay both owner's rate and occupier’s rate.--If such land is occupied by the owner, or if it is occupied by a tenant whose rent is not liable to enhancement on the ground that the value of the produce of the land or the productive powers of the land has or have teen increased by irrigation, such owner or tenant shall pay the owners rate as well as the occupiers rate.
footnote: 1. Sections 40 to 43 rep. in the Punjab by the Punjab Tenancy Act, 1887 (16 of 1887), s. 3 and the Schedule.
